# Aevum Labs

Building the governed context kernel for AI agents.

**[aevum-labs/aevum](https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum)** — the kernel: cryptographic audit trails, consent-bound context, human-review gates, and deterministic replay for every AI decision.

| Repo | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [aevum](https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum) | Main kernel (9 packages) |
| [aevum-spec](https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum-spec) | Protocol specification |
| [aevum-conformance](https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum-conformance) | Conformance test suite |
| [aevum-domains](https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum-domains) | Domain packs (planned) |

**Community:** [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum/discussions)
